What We Do

Our Services

Every job is quoted individually. Parts are separate from labor. We come to you.

◈
Body Kit
Full body kit and aero installs — front lips, side skirts, rear diffusers, spoilers, and complete kits. Precise fitment on any make or model. You supply the parts, we handle the install.
Labor quoted per job
◈
Ambient Lighting
Custom interior ambient lighting installs — footwells, door panels, dash, and trim accents for a clean, modern glow. You supply the kit, we handle the wiring and install.
Labor quoted per job
◈
Paint Correction
Multi-stage machine polishing that cuts out swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation to restore deep gloss and clarity. Ideal prep before a ceramic coating, or a standalone fix to bring tired, dull paint back to life.
Labor quoted per job
◈
Detailing
Complete interior and exterior detailing — hand wash, wheels, trim, glass, and a full interior clean. We bring your car back to showroom-fresh condition, inside and out.
Labor quoted per job
How It Works

The Process

Simple, straightforward, no BS.

01
Hit Us Up
Fill out the form or DM us on Instagram. Tell us what you're working with and what you want done.
02
Get a Quote
We give you a clear labor quote. You source the parts or we can handle it — your call.
03
We Come to You
We pull up to your location and handle everything. No shop drop-off required.
04
Drive Different
Your car leaves looking nothing like it arrived. That's the Gridlock standard.

Who We Are
GRIDLOCK
CUSTOMS
Est. 2026 — Charlotte, NC

Built Different.

Gridlock Customs didn't start with a lifelong obsession over specs and builds — it started with two cousins who simply wanted something to call their own. We gained real-world experience along the way and developed a genuine love for what cars can be. Gas, hybrid, or fully electric — we work on all of them. Most shops in the area won't touch a Tesla, but we will, and we'll give it the same care and attention as any other vehicle.

We started mobile because we wanted to make premium modifications accessible — no waiting rooms, no middlemen, just clean work done right at your door.

Donovan
Founder
Nate
Founder
Tesla Specialists

We Know Teslas.

Most shops treat a Tesla like any other car. We don't. Teslas have a completely different build — no engine bay, different panel gaps, unique trim systems and electronics. We know the platform inside out so your car is in the right hands.

  • Teslas have no engine bay — that completely changes how mods are approached, and we know exactly how
  • Tesla panel gaps and body lines require precise fitment most shops get wrong
  • We understand Tesla's electrical architecture so nothing gets damaged during installs
  • Aero mods designed specifically for Tesla body styles, not generic fitment
Full Build
